zh.lifeSummary: 當John Buckler II於1480年出生在英國維爾爾考瓦時，他的父親John Buckler30歲，母親Mary Compton35歲。他於大約1500年與Agnes Barber在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年在英國英格蘭維爾爾考瓦享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Buckler II于1480年出生在英国維爾爾考瓦时，他的父亲John Buckler30岁，母亲Mary Compton35岁。他于大约1500年与Agnes Barber在英国英格兰多瑟特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1540年在英国英格兰維爾爾考瓦享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Buckler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of buckles, Middle English bokeler, Old French bouclier (see Buckle ). Perhaps in some instances a nickname for a fencer, from Middle English bokeler-player.

variants.name: Buckle
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name for a maker of buckles or a nickname given to someone who wore a distinctive buckle, from Middle English bokel ‘buckle’.
English: habitational name from either Buckwell in Ashburnham (Sussex) or Buckwell in Kent.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Buckler II was born in 1480, in Causeway, Wiltshire, England, his father, John Buckler, was 30 and his mother, Mary Compton, was 35. He married Agnes Barber about 1500, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1540, in Causeway, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Buckler II est né en 1480, à Causeway, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John Buckler, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mary Compton, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Barber environ 1500, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1540, à Causeway, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Buckler II 1480 in Causeway, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Buckler 30 und seine Mutter Mary Compton 35. Er hat um 1500 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom Agnes Barber geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1540 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Causeway, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Buckler II è nato il nel 1480 nel Causeway, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, John Buckler, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mary Compton, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Barber circa 1500, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1540, nel Causeway, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Buckler IIが1480年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアカウセワイで生まれた時，父John Bucklerは30歳，母Mary Comptonは35歳であった。約1500年にイギリスイギリスドールセトでAgnes Barberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1540年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアカウセワイで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Buckler II(이)가 1480년 영국 윌츠히르 카세웨이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Buckler(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Compton(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 Agnes Barber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 카세웨이에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Buckler II nasceu em 1480, em Causeway, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Buckler, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mary Compton, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Barber aproximadamente 1500, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1540, em Causeway, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Buckler II родился в 1480 г. в местности каусюеи, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Buckler было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Compton, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Barber около 1500 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1540 г. в местности каусюеи, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Buckler II nació en 1480, en Causeway, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Buckler, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mary Compton, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Agnes Barber aproximadamente 1500, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1540, en Causeway, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
